changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Creating organization table for multi-tenant organization management.
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS organization ( id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, slug TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL, member_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, created_by INTEGER NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'), deleted_by INTEGER NULL, deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ NULL, FOREIGN KEY (created_by) REFERENCES "user" (id) ON DELETE RESTRICT, FOREIGN KEY (deleted_by) REFERENCES "user" (id) ON DELETE RESTRICT );
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_organization_slug_unique ON organization (slug) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL; CREATE INDEX idx_organization_status ON organization (status); CREATE INDEX idx_organization_created_by ON organization (created_by);

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Adding documentation for organization table, columns, and indexes.
